bug_locations.reason: The 'allow_redirects' parameter in the requests keyword arguments is incorrectly hardcoded to 'args.follow'. It should instead be set to True if '--follow' is present, but limited by 'args.max_redirects' to avoid the library's default behavior overriding custom limits.
The 'max_redirects' argument from the CLI is never passed into the 'kwargs' dictionary, meaning 'requests' uses its default limit (usually 30) instead of the user-specified one.
